evals.prompt: Audit this repository for AI agent readiness.

fixture.description: Popular math animation library. No tests, no agent config, minimal infrastructure.

expectations: Output contains one of: 'Bad', 'Ok', 'Good', 'Great' as the maturity level label
Output contains all four level headers: 'Readable', 'Runnable', 'Safe', 'Scalable'
Output does not contain '/27' anywhere
Each of the 9 categories has a score in the format '{n}/3' where n is 0-3
For every category scoring below 3, a sub-score block appears with findings and a recommendation
Agent documentation scores 0
Self-verification scores 0
Permissions and tool access scores 0
Code quality hooks scores 0
Rules and conventions scores 0
Maturity level is 'Bad'
Every recommendation is actionable: contains a concrete verb and a specific target (not just 'improve X')
Every finding cites at least one specific file path from the repo
No file paths are mentioned that do not exist in the fixture repo
Recommendations reference files that exist in the fixture repo
